compressed_prompt: Craft a humorous irs joke featuring a placeholder [X]. No commas in formal tone.
response: In a peculiar twist of fate [X] found themselves in an IRS audit. The agent leaned forward and said "We have reason to believe your tax return is inaccurate." [X] replied "That's impossible! I filled it out while I was sober!" The agent chuckled and responded "Well that explains a lot."
